name: Broiled Ginger Beef Strips
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 lb Beef top round, cut into 1 inch thick strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soy sauce, oil, water, sugar, garlic, and ginger in a small bowl for the marinade.
2. Partially freeze steak to firm; slice diagonally across grain into 1/8-inch thick strips.
3. Place beef strips in a plastic bag or shallow, non-metal pan. Pour marinade over meat, turning to coat.
4. Seal bag or cover pan and refrigerate for 6 hours or overnight, turning at least once.
5. Combine lettuce, radishes, and green onion tops in a large bowl and set aside.
6. Preheat broiler.
7. Remove meat from marinade and place in a single layer in a large shallow baking pan.
8. Place pan on broiler rack so meat is 3 to 4 inches from the heat. Broil steak for about 2 minutes, until browned; turn and broil for 2 minutes longer.
9. Arrange steak strips on bed of lettuce mixture. Pour pan drippings over meat, if desired.
